_comment: Tier-2 for NGSolve hyperelasticity#: catalog falsification — solvers.Newton uses maxit (singular), NOT maxits. Calling solvers.Newton(a, gfu, maxits=20) raises TypeError: Newton() got an unexpected keyword argument 'maxits'. Real signature: Newton(a, u, freedofs=None, maxit=100, maxerr=1e-11, inverse='', dirichletvalues=None, dampfactor=1, printing=True, callback=None). Five generator occurrences before 2026-06-01 used the wrong kwarg (hyperelasticity.py L38, L88, L102; advanced.py L654, L738) — all rewritten to maxit in same commit. Verified empirically 2026-06-01 (NGSolve 6.2.2604).
